word: H86 - אַבְרֵךְ - ʼabrêk - ab-rake' - Bow the knee

sections.paragraph:
Original: אברך

Transliteration: 'abrêk

Phonetic: ab-rake'

BDB Definition:

  1. (meaning dubious) - a shout made to announce Joseph's chariot
    1. command
    2. bow

Origin: probably an Egyptian word meaning kneel

TWOT entry: 14

Part(s) of speech:
